ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the student belongs to */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, on leave, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES supervisors ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name or ID of the department head */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of research project (e.g., dissertation, thesis) */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student owning the project */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor overseeing the project */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the project was started */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, approved) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and categorization */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Brief summary of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES supervisors ("supervisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supervisors" (
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supervisor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supervisor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the supervisor belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the supervisor */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the document belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., proposal, draft, final submission) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback instance */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the feedback is for */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the supervisor */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Quantitative rating of the feedback */,
  "revised_document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revised document based on feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_revised_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("revised_document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES supervisors ("supervisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser/device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., productivity, progress) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_logs" (
  "report_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report log event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being generated or accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating or accessing the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
